compare-selected-page-range-pdfs.title: Compare Selected Page Range of Two PDFs
compare-selected-page-range-pdfs.description: Loads two PDF documents, adjusts a user‑defined page range, and performs a text‑based comparison on each page within that range.

compare-pdf-documents-page-by-page.title: Compare PDF Documents Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF

compare-selected-pdf-pages.title: Compare Selected PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf
compare-selected-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to compare specific pages from two PDF documents by extracting those pages into temporary documents and using the side‑by‑side comparer provided by Aspose.Pdf.

exclude-areas-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Areas from PDF Side‑by‑Side Comparison
exclude-areas-from-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to define rectangular regions to exclude from both PDFs and perform a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison.

exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
exclude-annotations-from-pdf-comparison.description: Shows how to collect annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and configure side‑by‑side comparison to ignore those areas using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdfs-excluding-footer-areas.title: Compare PDFs While Excluding Footer Areas
compare-pdfs-excluding-footer-areas.description: Demonstrates how to exclude rectangular footer regions from a side‑by‑side PDF comparison using Aspose.Pdf's comparison options.

compare-two-pdfs-and-generate-visual-dif.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate a Visual Diff
compare-two-pdfs-and-generate-visual-dif.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison, saves a diff PDF, and prints basic text‑difference statistics.

set-custom-image-similarity-tolerance-pd.title: Set Custom Image Similarity Tolerance for PDF Comparison
set-custom-image-similarity-tolerance-pd.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs containing scanned images using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer with a custom similarity tolerance.

compare-pdfs-including-form-field-values.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
compare-pdfs-including-form-field-values.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf while taking AcroForm field values into account, producing a side‑by‑side visual diff and retrieving raw page‑level differences.

compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
compare-pdfs-ignore-signature-fields.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents, verify their digital signatures, and exclude signature field regions from the visual diff using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.title: Align and Compare PDF Pages with Different Sizes
compare-pdfs-different-page-sizes.description: The example loads two PDF documents, adjusts the second page to match the first page's dimensions, and uses Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer to compare the pages and generate a comparison PDF.

compare-pdfs-ignore-compression.title: Compare PDFs Ignoring Compression Differences
compare-pdfs-ignore-compression.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs that use different compression settings, focusing on textual differences and producing both a visual diff PDF and a JSON diff report.

compare-pdfs-unicode-text-differences.title: Detect Unicode Text Differences Between PDFs
compare-pdfs-unicode-text-differences.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with different language encodings (e.g., English and Russian) using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison to detect Unicode text differences and generate a visual diff PDF.

compare-pdfs-font-differences.title: Compare PDFs for Font Differences and Generate JSON Report
compare-pdfs-font-differences.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files, filter out font‑related differences, and export the diff operations to a JSON report using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-encrypted-pdfs-side-by-side.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs with Side‑by‑Side Visual Result
compare-encrypted-pdfs-side-by-side.description: Demonstrates loading password‑protected PDF files, comparing them using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer, and saving a visual diff PDF.

compare-pdfs-from-streams.title: Compare PDFs from Streams and Generate Diff PDF
compare-pdfs-from-streams.description: Shows how to load two PDF documents from in‑memory streams, perform a visual page‑by‑page comparison using GraphicalPdfComparer, and write the resulting diff PDF to a MemoryStream without creating temporary files.

write-pdf-diff-to-http-response.title: Write PDF Diff Directly to HTTP Response Stream
write-pdf-diff-to-http-response.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs side‑by‑side and writing the resulting diff PDF directly to a provided output stream, suitable for ASP.NET Core response bodies.

generate-visual-diff-pdf.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
generate-visual-diff-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents visually and create a diff PDF using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

generate-pdf-difference-image.title: Generate Visual Difference Image Between Two PDFs
generate-pdf-difference-image.description: Demonstrates how to compare the first pages of two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, obtain an ImagesDifference object, and save a PNG that visualizes the pixel‑wise differences.

create-diff-pdf-using-graphicalpdfcompar.title: Create Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
create-diff-pdf-using-graphicalpdfcompar.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, and saves a diff PDF that highlights the changes to a specified folder.

generate-diff-pdf-highlighted-text-chang.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes
generate-diff-pdf-highlighted-text-chang.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs, creating a diff PDF with highlighted text changes using Aspose.Pdf, and verifying that the highlight colour matches the default yellow.

pdf-diff-report-json.title: Generate PDF Difference Report in JSON
pdf-diff-report-json.description: The example loads two PDF files, compares page count and page dimensions, records any differences, and writes a JSON report of the diff operations.

replace-changed-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
replace-changed-text-in-pdf.description: Compares two PDF pages, extracts the original text from the first PDF via DiffOperation objects, and replaces the changed content on the second PDF with the original text.

compare-pdfs-log-diff-operations.title: Compare PDFs and Log Diff Operations by Page
compare-pdfs-log-diff-operations.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf and write an audit log that records each diff operation type together with its page number.

compare-two-pdfs-visual-diff.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate Visual Diff
compare-two-pdfs-visual-diff.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf's flat document comparison, saves a PDF that highlights the differences, and prints a summary of the diff operations.

preserve-pdf-metadata-after-comparison.title: Preserve PDF Metadata After Comparison
preserve-pdf-metadata-after-comparison.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs side‑by‑side using Aspose.Pdf and then copy the original document's metadata to the generated diff PDF.

multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.title: Multi‑Threaded PDF Comparison with Aspose.Pdf
multi-threaded-pdf-comparison.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple PDF pairs concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparison API and .NET tasks, saving each result to a separate file.

parallel-batch-pdf-comparison.title: Parallel Batch PDF Comparison with Concurrency Limit
parallel-batch-pdf-comparison.description: Compares multiple PDF files against a baseline PDF in parallel while limiting the degree of parallelism to control memory usage, and saves side‑by‑side comparison results.

pdf-diff-images-to-zip.title: Generate PDF Diff Images and Zip Them
pdf-diff-images-to-zip.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, create visual diff images, and package the images into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.
